economic_notes: Band holds interests in forestry, environmental services, property rental and management, and real property partnerships. Ongoing specific claim negotiation with Canadian government for Indian Reserve #8 compensation. COVID-19 impact noted as uncertain.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Eight entities accounted for under modified equity method as government business enterprises/partnerships including forestry, environmental services, and property management partnerships. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Long-term debt includes non-interest bearing promissory notes to ISC related to IR #8 specific claim totalling $306,315. Annual debt service represents repayment of All Nations Trust Company loan only ($26,267). Total government transfers includes ISC ($425,645) and CMHC ($27,226) = $452,871. OSR calculated as $1,371,466 minus $452,871 = $918,595 (includes GBE income, gaming, rental, property tax, interest, other). Contingent asset exists for IR #8 claim settlement — amount unknown.
